moqui.basic.Enumeration.description: Not subject to VAT under the articles from 7 to 7-septies of DPR 633/72
Not taxable - transfers to San Marino
Not taxable - transactions treated as export supplies
Not taxable - for declaration of intent
Not taxable - other transactions that don’t contribute to the determination of ceiling
Margin Regime / VAT not exposed on invoice
Reverse charge - transfer of scrap and of other recyclable materials
Reverse charge - transfer of gold and silver in accordance with law 7/2000 as well as used jewelry to OPO
Reverse charge - subcontracting in the construction sector
Reverse charge - transfer of mobile phones
Reverse charge - transfer of electronic products
Reverse charge - provisions in the construction and related sectors
Reverse charge - transactions in the energy sector

VAT paid in other EU countries (telecommunications, telebroadcasting and electronic services provision pursuant to Art. 7 - octies, paragraph 1, letter a, b, art. 74-sexies Italian Presidential Decree 633/72)
Tax - State Workers' Comp Insurance Employee
Tax - City, Borough, and Township Withholding
Tax - National Pension and Welfare Fund for Lawyers and Solicitors
Tax - Pension and welfare fund for surveyors
Tax - National pension and welfare fund for self-employed engineers and architects
Tax - National pension and welfare fund for bookkeepers and commercial experts
Tax - National welfare board for sales agents and representatives (ENASARCO)
Tax - National pension and welfare board for employment consultants (ENPACL)
Tax - National pension and welfare board for doctors (ENPAM)
Tax - National pension and welfare board for pharmacists (ENPAF)
Tax - National pension and welfare board for veterinary physicians (ENPAV)
Tax - National pension and welfare board for agricultural employees (ENPAIA)
Tax - Pension fund for employees of shipping companies and maritime agencies
Tax - National pension institute for Italian journalists (INPGI)
Tax - National welfare board for orphans of Italian doctors (ONAOSI)
Tax - Autonomous supplementary welfare fund for Italian journalists (CASAGIT)
Tax - Pension board for industrial experts and graduate industrial experts (EPPI)
Tax - National multi-category pension and welfare board (EPAP)
Tax - National pension and welfare board for biologists (ENPAB)
Tax - National pension and welfare board for the nursing profession (ENPAPI)
Tax - National pension and welfare board for psychologists (ENPAP)
